run_command:
set -a && [ -f ../../../.env ] && . ../../../.env || true; set +a; if [ -n "${OPENROUTER_API_KEY:-}" ] && [ -z "${OPENAI_API_KEY:-}" ]; then export OPENAI_API_KEY="$OPENROUTER_API_KEY"; fi; if [ -n "${OPENROUTER_BASE_URL:-}" ] && [ -z "${OPENAI_API_BASE:-}" ]; then export OPENAI_API_BASE="$OPENROUTER_BASE_URL"; fi; if [ -z "${OPENAI_API_BASE:-}" ] && [ -n "${OPENAI_API_KEY:-}" ]; then export OPENAI_API_BASE=https://api.openai.com/v1; fi; if [ -z "${OPENAI_API_KEY:-}" ]; then echo 'Missing OPENAI_API_KEY/OPENROUTER_API_KEY for LongMemEval run' >&2; exit 2; fi; python - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
data = json.loads(Path('data/longmemeval_oracle.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
out = Path('/tmp/longmemeval_hypothesis.jsonl')
with out.open('w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    for row in data:
        f.write(json.dumps({'question_id': row['question_id'], 'hypothesis': ''}) + '\n')
PY
cd src/evaluation && python3 evaluate_qa.py gpt-4o /tmp/longmemeval_hypothesis.jsonl ../../data/longmemeval_oracle.json && python3 - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
log_path = Path('/tmp/longmemeval_hypothesis.jsonl.log')
rows = [json.loads(line) for line in log_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8').splitlines() if line.strip()]
correct = sum(1 for r in rows if str(r.get('autoeval_label','')).upper() == 'CORRECT')
total = len(rows)
summary = {'benchmark':'LongMemEval','mode':'official_evaluation','total':total,'correct':correct,'accuracy':(correct/total if total else 0.0)}
Path("/Users/markcastillo/git/eidolon-agent-memory/docs/evals/artifacts/longmemeval_20260418T214520Z.json").write_text(json.dumps(summary, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')
PY
